signal: seen.json structural bug: collection agent writes new URLs at JSON top level instead of inside 'entries' sub-dict.
action: Fixed seen.json data. Added structural constraint to feed-collect SKILL.md Step 5.

signal: arXiv URL normalization rule from ct_031 fix (feed-collector v1.13.1) was not carried over to new feed-collect v1.0.0 during architectural split.
action: Added URL normalization rules (arXiv abs/pdf unification, utm removal, anchor stripping) to feed-collect v1.0.1 Step 3.

signal: PCEC cron (95c267ae) timed out at 600s during 15:00 CST run. Daily logs growing very large due to feed pipeline split documentation. Opus model + massive context = timeout risk.
action: Updated PCEC cron Phase 1a to size-aware daily-log reading (head + markers + tail) to reduce context and timeout risk.
evidence_156: 2026-03-19 12:00 CST (evt_156): cycle completed within timeout. Daily logs moderate (60+197 lines). Size-aware reading working correctly. 2 cycles clean since fix.

signal: feed-score occasionally produced incomplete scoreBreakdown (omitted `减分:0`) and used `git add -A`, risking accidental commits of unrelated changes.
action: Released feed-score v1.1.1: added repo-dirty guardrail, added Step 5 scoreBreakdown completeness check, replaced `git add -A` with staging only blog-day paths + allowlist check.
evidence_156: 2026-03-19 12:00 CST: 14/14 articles in 2026-03-19/ all have complete scoreBreakdown with 减分:0. 3 cycles clean since fix.

signal: Heartbeat misdiagnosed human-triggered SIGUSR1 restarts as 'periodic crash pattern'. Human had to intervene twice. Root cause: (1) heartbeat checked gwup but not logs for restart reason, (2) GLM-5-turbo format inertia in 120K token session ignored new HEARTBEAT.md rules.
action: Massive heartbeat restructure: moved logic to HEARTBEAT.md, added log forensics command, migrated to cron isolated session with lightContext:true to eliminate behavior inertia from long session history.
evidence_156: 2026-03-19 12:00 CST: heartbeat cron running successfully — lastStatus:ok, consecutiveErrors:0, lastDuration:105s. Isolated session with lightContext working. No restart misdiagnosis reported. 2 cycles clean.

signal: GLM-5-turbo cron jobs timeout when full workspace context is injected. Pattern: heartbeat (298s timeout), thread-archiver (300s timeout). Both fixed by adding lightContext:true.
action: Applied lightContext:true to thread-archiver cron. Increased feed-broadcast timeout to 600s.
evidence_156: 2026-03-19 12:00 CST: heartbeat with lightContext: 105s, 0 errors. Thread-archiver with lightContext: 13s, 0 errors. Both converging. Need 1 more cycle.

signal: 记忆整合 cron (320cca06) failed with 'Edit: in SOUL.md (26 chars) failed'. Root cause: consolidation agent tried to add content that already existed in SOUL.md (2026-03-18 反思 section). Idempotent edit failure — the desired content is present, but the cron reported error.
action: Benign failure confirmed (grep shows content exists). No functional impact. Monitoring for recurrence. Next consolidation: 2026-03-22 03:00.

signal: feed-collect and feed-score both timing out at 600s with GLM-5-turbo. consecutiveErrors:2 each. First test yesterday completed in ~5-6min each, but 600s leaves no margin for API slowness or network delays.
action: Increased timeout from 600s to 900s for both cron jobs (0ead0a6f, 802b31b9). 50% headroom over observed nominal runtime.

signal: 昊辰 rejected scripted error-handling added to 记忆整合 cron prompt ('if edit fails, skip'). Lesson: don't treat models as script engines — give goals and constraints, not hardcoded exception handlers.
action: Grounded as permanent reference: memory/reference/prompt-design-principles.md. Documented anti-patterns and correct approach.
